docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BANKS III. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT TAYLOR DAVIS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
